visuals.title: Certificate Lifecycle
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Certificate Lifecycle and Revocation</text>
  
  <!-- Certificate Generation -->
  <rect x="50" y="60" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Generation
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Certificate Distribution -->
  <rect x="250" y="60" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Distribution
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Certificate Validation -->
  <rect x="50" y="150" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Validation
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Certificate Expiration -->
  <rect x="250" y="150" width="120" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="310" y="175" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Expiration
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Certificate Revocation -->
  <rect x="150" y="240" width="120" height="40" fill="#1565C0" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="265" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Revocation
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Generation to Distribution -->
  <path d="M170 80 L240 80" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <polygon points="240,80 235,75 235,85" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Distribution to Validation -->
  <path d="M310 100 L310 140" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <polygon points="310,140 305,135 315,135" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Validation to Expiration -->
  <path d="M170 170 L240 170" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <polygon points="240,170 235,165 235,175" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Expiration to Revocation -->
  <path d="M310 190 L310 230" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <polygon points="310,230 305,225 315,225" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
  
  <!-- Arrow from Revocation back to Generation -->
  <path d="M150 260 L50 260 L50 100" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="5,5" fill="none" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <polygon points="50,100 45,95 45,105" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>
</svg>
